design_concept.description: A clean, highly functional dashboard designed for a PhD applicant. It balances dense data presentation with an elegant, academic aesthetic. The design relies on structured bento grids, crisp typography, and a warm, sophisticated color palette that feels organic and focused. Surfaces are flat and solid—avoiding overly digital glassmorphism—to mimic the tactile feel of academic papers and well-organized journals.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for major sections. Cards should have at least p-6.
spacing_and_layout.page_structure: Sidebar navigation (w-64) on the left, main content area taking the rest of the screen. Max width for content can be 7xl to allow dense tables to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.tables: Dense rows, tight padding (py-3 px-4). Use 1px borders (#E5E0D8) to separate rows. No zebra striping, keep it clean.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Flat solid surfaces with a delicate 1px border. No heavy drop shadows. Optional subtle shadow-sm on hover for interactive cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#A64B2A] text-white hover:bg-[#8A3E22] transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F8F5F0] text-[#A64B2A] border border-[#A64B2A] hover:bg-[#F0EBE1] transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#E6A64B] text-[#2A2522] hover:bg-[#D5963E] transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-[#5C544E] hover:text-[#A64B2A] hover:bg-[#F8F5F0] transition-colors px-4 py-2 rounded-md

progress_bars.fill: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#6FA3A6] to-[#A64B2A] h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out

badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

inputs.style: bg-[#FDFCFB] border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-[#2A2522] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6FA3A6]/50 focus:border-[#6FA3A6] transition-all

tabs.item_active: pb-4 border-b-2 border-[#A64B2A] text-[#A64B2A] font-medium transition-colors

visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for a clean, academic, slightly technical feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Rely on crisp 1px borders (#E5E0D8) for separation rather than shadows.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use simple, elegant layouts with an oversized Phosphor icon in Teal (#6FA3A6), a heading, and a muted description.

animations.hover: Subtle transform (-translate-y-[1px]) and color transitions on interactive elements.
animations.lists: Staggered fade-in (using Framer Motion) for table rows and outreach cards.
animations.progress: Width transition on load for score bars.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the off-white background meets WCAG AA standards. The Burnt Orange (#A64B2A) and dark text (#2A2522) provide excellent contrast.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6FA3A6]/50 focus:outline-none).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the progress bar animations and list staggers.

profile_avatar.description: Profile picture for the user, Radhika Chhabria.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography.
Set up Tailwind configuration to include the custom color palette (e.g., brand-primary: #A64B2A, brand-secondary: #E6A64B, brand-accent: #6FA3A6, page-bg: #F8F5F0).
Include 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in the index.html or global CSS.
Implement the 'Find Professors' button with a loading state (spinner or pulsating effect).
In the Discover tab table, the 5 score columns (research fit, methods overlap, lab activity, program strength, overall) MUST be rendered as progress bars.

Implement the Outreach tab with collapsible cards for each professor. Each card should have the workflow sequence clearly delineated (Generate Brief -> Generate Package -> Email Text Area -> Actions).
History tab should be a clean timeline or list view with inline toggles for 'Response received' and 'Interested'.
Do NOT use generic glassmorphism. Stick to the 'Academic Precision' aesthetic with flat, solid white cards on the off-white background.
Ensure the layout is highly functional and dense where needed (tables), but generous with padding in forms and profile settings.
All forms (Profile/Settings) should have clear labels, adequately spaced inputs, and descriptive helper text.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles) for testing purposes.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp borders.
NEVER apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations.
Ensure text contrast ratios meet APCA/WCAG standards.
